info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Resource Manager API

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Gets all subscriptions for the authenticated tenant.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Gets details about the specified subscription.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

params.name: $filter
params.description: The filter to apply on the operation using OData syntax.

params.name: $top
params.description: The number of results to return.

items.docs: Gets all the resource groups for a subscription.

info.name: Microsoft Azure Get a Resource Group

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Gets a resource group by name.

info.name: Microsoft Azure Create or Update a Resource Group

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Creates or updates a resource group.

info.name: Microsoft Azure Update a Resource Group

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Updates a resource group. Resource groups can be updated by patching the resource group properties, such as tags.

info.name: Microsoft Azure Delete a Resource Group

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

params.name: forceDeletionTypes
params.description: The resource types that should be force deleted. Comma-separated list of resource type names.

items.docs: Deletes a resource group. When you delete a resource group, all of its resources are also deleted.

info.name: Microsoft Azure List All Resources in a Subscription

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

params.name: $filter
params.description: The filter to apply on the operation using OData syntax.

params.name: $expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of additional properties to be included in the response. Valid values include createdTime, changedTime, and provisioningState.

params.name: $top
params.description: The number of results to return.

items.docs: Get all the resources in a subscription.

info.name: Microsoft Azure List Resources in a Resource Group

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

params.name: $filter
params.description: The filter to apply on the operation using OData syntax.

params.name: $top
params.description: The number of results to return.

items.docs: Get all the resources for a resource group.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: deploymentName
params.description: The name of the deployment.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

info.name: Microsoft Azure Create or Update a Deployment

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: deploymentName
params.description: The name of the deployment.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Deploys resources at resource group scope. You can provide the template and parameters directly in the request or link to JSON files.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

params.name: $expand
params.description: The properties to include in the results. For example, use resourceTypes/aliases to get the aliases for resource types.

items.docs: Gets all resource providers for a subscription.

info.name: Microsoft Azure List Predefined Tag Names

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The ID of the target subscription.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Gets a summary of tag usage under the subscription. This operation performs a union of predefined tags, resource tags, resource group tags and subscription tags.
